title: Withdraw ₳300,000 for Ledger App Rewrite administered by Intersect

rationale.summary: Vote: NEEDS_MORE_INFO. For this TreasuryWithdrawals (enacted), critical information needed for a responsible directional vote is still missing. Decisive reason: if claims cannot be tied to replayable evidence, abstaining avoids overclaiming certainty. Weighed against it: the proposal substantiates "This treasury withdrawal funds Ledger App Rewrite which will provide the following services: Vacuum Labs will work with Ledger team to design new UI according to the expectations." and clears the evidence gates. What would enable a directional vote: Provide: independent ecosystem-value evidence packet; Provide: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity. Residual uncertainty: Treasury flow signal is in stressed regime (total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals). Confidence context: score -0.18; confidence 76.6%.
rationale.summary_raw: DRep ratification support is above the hard-fork threshold; treated as a positive context signal.
top_fixes: Provide: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity
Provide: cost comparables, budget proportionality, or sustainability evidence
missing_evidence: verified ecosystem benefit or strategic necessity
cost comparables, budget proportionality, or sustainability evidence
delivery controls, milestones, assurance, or remedy path

sections.title: Intake
sections.conclusion: Baseline fields and source anchors establish whether the proposal can be reviewed at all.

sections.title: Claims and evidence
findings: Proposal document read by reasoning layer: yes
Requested: Withdraw ₳300,000 for Ledger App Rewrite administered by Intersect

Deliverables: This treasury withdrawal funds Ledger App Rewrite which will provide the following services: Vacuum Labs will work with Ledger team to design new UI according to the expectations., Implement new UI into the Cardano Ledger App., Pass the external audit process (costs for this shall be included in proposal)., Support the Ledger team by the release process.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, high materiality): This treasury withdrawal funds Ledger App Rewrite which will provide the following services: Vacuum Labs will work with Ledger team to design new UI according to the expectations.
Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Implement new UI into the Cardano Ledger App.
Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Pass the external audit process (costs for this shall be included in proposal).
Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Support the Ledger team by the release process.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): This proposal aims to solve the following problem: In 2018 when Ledger Cardano App was developed, there was no standard for embedded app UI.

Claim (economic, independently_verifiable, low materiality): Over the years this changed and now Cardano is the only Ledger application with non-standard UI such as requiring double-click several times during the confirmation process.
sections.conclusion: Each claim must map to replayable public evidence; proposer assertions alone are not enough for confidence.

sections.title: Treasury analysis
findings: Six-month treasury flow regime: stressed (basis: total inflow (tau + donations) vs enacted withdrawals)
sections.conclusion: Treasury votes require a higher bar because they consume shared ADA and create precedent.

sections.title: Risk review
sections.conclusion: Risk is not a side note; unmitigated execution or governance risk can dominate an otherwise attractive proposal.

sections.title: Counterargument pass
findings: Strongest YES: the proposal substantiates "This treasury withdrawal funds Ledger App Rewrite which will provide the following services: Vacuum Labs will work with Ledger team to design new UI according to the expectations." and clears the evidence gates.
Strongest NO: weak controls, unclear delivery, or governance precedent could outweigh the benefit of TreasuryWithdrawals.
Strongest hold: if claims cannot be tied to replayable evidence, abstaining avoids overclaiming certainty.
sections.conclusion: A defensible rationale must show the best opposing case before it reaches a vote.

sections.title: Synthesis
findings: Final vote must be derived from completed sections above, not from a prose summary.
The public rationale should name the decisive section and the strongest counterargument.
sections.conclusion: The vote is only credible if the assessment tree shows enough work for a skeptical delegator to audit.

decision_contract.composite_formula: 40% ecosystem benefit + 25% delivery confidence + 20% cost efficiency + 15% downside protection - 0.50
decision_contract.yes_rule: All quality floors, independently verified evidence, verified NCL, and portfolio capacity must pass.
decision_contract.no_rule: Requires affirmative independently verified waste/harm plus ecosystem benefit below 55%; missing evidence alone is never NO.
decision_contract.portfolio_gate: Verified on-chain Net Change Limit and opportunity-cost portfolio eligibility are mandatory for treasury direction.
